description_long: This object consists of four small, round snack cups joined together in a 2x2 arrangement, each with a light pink body and a matching lid. The lids are decorated with a large, cartoon-style strawberry graphic and the word 'Strawberry' in bold red letters. The sides of each cup also feature a similar strawberry illustration, giving a playful and appealing look. The cups appear to be made of plastic, with a glossy finish on both the body and the lid. The packaging is typical for single-serve yogurt or pudding snacks, designed to be separated for individual consumption. The overall appearance is bright, cheerful, and clearly aimed at attracting attention, especially from children or families.
description: A set of four pink plastic snack cups with cartoon strawberry graphics and 'Strawberry' text on the lids, joined together in a 2x2 pack. The cups have a glossy finish and are designed for individual serving.
description_view_0: Front view showing two cups with the strawberry graphic and 'Strawberry' text visible on the lids and sides.
description_view_1: Back view with the 'Strawberry' text on the lids upside down and the side graphics less visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the cups' rounded bodies and partial strawberry graphics on the sides and lids.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'Strawberry' text on the sides clearly visible and the strawberry graphics facing forward.
attribute_flavor_indication: Strawberry flavor indicated by the word 'Strawberry' and cartoon strawberry graphics on lids and sides.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Cartoon strawberry mascot on lids and sides; no other promotional graphics present.
